subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto a handmaiden of God, that she may rejoice in God's remembrance of her and partake of the fruits [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی امه من اماء الله لتستبشر بذکر الله ایاها ذقی من اثمار
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
